name: MultiQ International AB (publ)
summary: MultiQ International AB (publ) provides digital signage and customized monitors primarily for public environment applications in Northern Europe. The company offers monitors, self-service monitors, ITS solutions, outdoor monitors, and monitor accessories for in-store Web and TV; video wall; educational guide; self-service, queue, window, and outdoor signage; point-of-sale; corporate TV; digital menu boards; live betting data; infotainment; real time traffic info; and traffic management info applications. It serves banking, retail, transportation, government, gaming, and corporate markets. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Lund, Sweden.
